item.title: KORE Stock Is Ripping Pre-Market Today After Company Agrees To A Deal To Take It Private
item.description: KORE stated that Searchlight and Abry will acquire all shares of the company’s issued and outstanding common stock that they currently don’t own in an...

item.title: BKKT Stock Heads For 5-Month Lows – What Happened?
item.description: The company priced a $48 million registered direct offering to a single institutional investor.

item.title: Why Did NGNE Stock Surge 25% In Pre-Market Today?
item.description: The company said that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted a key designation for its investigational gene therapy targeting Rett syndrome.

item.title: MSTR CEO Thinks AI ‘Doom Loop’ Is Threatening Humanity And Bitcoin Can Save It
item.description: According to Strategy CEO Phong Le, the more successful AI becomes, the more it poses a “threat” to the core pillars of humanity.

item.title: WBD Gets A Double Downgrade After Netflix Pulls Out Of Bidding War With Paramount Skydance — Here's What Analysts Said
item.description: Raymond James analysts stated that they see more attractive investment opportunities elsewhere in their coverage.
